sys_script_include.name: Autoupdateborrowerdetails

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_a3db61740f9907d007652fc530d1b28a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_1902003_skillb_0.Autoupdateborrowerdetails</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>Autoupdateborrowerdetails</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var Autoupdateborrowerdetails = Class.create();
Autoupdateborrowerdetails.prototype = Object.extendsObject(AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

    getDetails: function() {

        var userId = this.getParameter('sysparm_user');

        var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_user');

        if (gr.get(userId)) {

            var obj = {};

            obj.full_name = gr.getValue('name');
            obj.email = gr.getValue('email');
            obj.phone = gr.getValue('phone');

            return JSON.stringify(obj);
        }

        return '';

    },

    type: 'Autoupdateborrowerdetails'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-03 08:20:28</sys_created_on><sys_id>a3db61740f9907d007652fc530d1b28a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Autoupdateborrowerdetails</sys_name><sys_package display_value="SkillBridge Bank " source="x_1902003_skillb_0">422819f80f454b5007652fc530d1b277</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SkillBridge Bank ">422819f80f454b5007652fc530d1b277</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_a3db61740f9907d007652fc530d1b28a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-03 08:20:28</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
